raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "exhortation urging the soul to persist in self-abuse for a limited remaining period before self-respect becomes impossible",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the soul possesses agency to choose self-abuse or self-respect",
    "a finite window exists during which self-respect remains available",
    "continued self-contempt is advisable or necessary before that window closes"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a paradoxical imperative but rests on an unstated temporal premise that creates tension between present action and future state",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "recipient accepts the finite-time premise and interprets the imperative as motivational self-discipline within a Stoic or ascetic framework",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "statement is taken as literal endorsement of ongoing self-harm without temporal limit or is applied outside any framework that values eventual self-respect"
}
